coding_standard: Production-grade Python with strict typing, async-first boundaries, explicit domain exception taxonomy, JSON-formatted structured logging, and `async with` resource lifecycle management.
learning_vision: Become an AI master champion by using this repository as a practical, end-to-end engineering handbook. Every module is a teachable, production-style implementation.

module_boundaries.llm_client: backend/llm_client for provider adapters and base contracts
module_boundaries.vector_store: backend/vector_store for vector DB abstractions and implementations (base.py, chroma_store.py, pg_vector.py)
module_boundaries.rag_pipeline: backend/rag_pipeline for retrieval, reranking, query transformation (engine.py, query_processor.py)
module_boundaries.agents: backend/agents for orchestration and tool execution loops

project_structure.reference_material: python-learning (local-only, git-ignored, foundational Python notebooks and resources)

production_pitfalls_defended: Prompt injection — strict system/user role separation, no raw user text in system prompts
Embedding model drift — versioned embedding columns, re-embedding migration scripts
Token payload cost — token budget enforcement via tiktoken, cross-encoder pruning to top-5
High-concurrency vector ingestion — asyncpg connection pooling, batched upserts, backpressure via semaphore
Lost in the middle — cross-encoder re-ranking mitigates context window dilution
N+1 embedding calls — batched embedding API calls for all query variants at once
